United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Haunted
programme.desc: Linda is terrified when her candle shop is flooded by the sound of screeching monkeys and primate-like shadows dance on the walls. What happened here.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: Pete treks to New York's Catskill Mountains to build his first glass house in the sky; piecing materials together like a puzzle, Pete uses his clients' collection of 50 vintage windows to construct an elegant tree house encased by walls of glass.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: Pete and his gang ride out to the Lone Star State to build a double-decker hideout in Texas Hill Country; Pete creates rustic perfection in six live oak trees with a saloon-style first floor for sippin' sarsaparilla and a glass floor for views below.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: When the CIA fires Harm, he lands a job flying a crop-duster for a teenage boss; staff discovers Harm's replacement has lied about her credentials.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: The admiral buries Harm in backlogged case files; a veteran (Ossie Davis) says a bureaucratic snafu forced him to steal; a submarine picks up a North Korean crew imperiled by a SARS outbreak.

programme.title: Crime In Progress
programme.desc: Indiana officers face a tense standoff at a suspected kidnapping scene, while in Colorado a mother's grim discovery sparks a chilling case.

programme.title: Nightwatch
programme.desc: A chaotic evening finds Tampa first responders treating seizure and overdose patients; suspected armed robbers lead the ROC Squad Task Force in a high-speed chase.

programme.title: Nightwatch
programme.desc: On a night that leaves the EMT crew holding its breath, the first responders aid patients suffering from a strange assortment of afflictions, from being impaled by wood to getting thrown from a moving vehicle.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: When an art dealer's wife dies in a car crash, questions arise whether it was an accident or a murder.

programme.title: VPI: Vinnie Politan Investigates
programme.desc: Vinnie Politan takes a deep dive into the true-crime stories that are captivating the world over.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A jeweler's search through old sales records helps police find likely suspects in the murder of elderly couple Edward Kowalzck and Gertrude Thompson.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A garbage bag leads police to a child's killer.

programme.title: The Playboy Murders
programme.desc: As a Playboy Bunny, Jackie Hendrickson is forbidden from fraternizing with her customers; Atlanta plastic surgeon Dr. Warren Brown is impossible to resist, and their illicit affair sets off a deadly chain of events.

programme.title: Toxic
programme.desc: Elizabeth digs into convicted conman, Anthony Strangis; after unpacking his MO with Sarma, Elizabeth uncovers a string of alleged new victims; new revelations suggest Anthony Strangis is at it again and put Elizabeth hot on his trail.

programme.title: Portals To Hell
programme.desc: Jack and Katrina attempt to calm restless spirits at the historic Taylor Trask Museum in Massachusetts. Reports say spirits have been throwing TVs across rooms.

programme.title: Spooked Scotland
programme.desc: The crew visit Bannockburn House, a haunted 17th Century mansion. They use one-of-a-kind equipment to interact with the ghost of Bonnie Prince Charles.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland
programme.desc: Mindy Morgenstern, a college student and waitress, is found strangled and stabbed in her own apartment; family, friends and the entire town of Valley City, N.D., help law enforcement identify the monster who committed this violent crime.

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: In Madison, Wis., Andrew Nesbitt is found murdered on his 46th birthday; with no witnesses, investigators turn to surveillance cameras in bars and taxi cabs and on street corners to track down his killer.

programme.title: The Last Woodsmen
programme.desc: After an all-hands push to Devil's Chute, Jared and his crew build a big convoy, starting a 20-mile climb to the final logging grounds; with float camp on the move and a coastal storm closing in, this haul could make or break their season.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: With no port for shelter, Johnathan fights to protect his crew as Typhoon Halong pounds the northern grounds; Rick's Red King jackpot halts when a line fouls his prop; in 25-foot seas, Jake discovers the limits of the Cornelia Marie's fishing operations.

programme.title: Combat Dealers
programme.desc: Charismatic Bruce Crompton and his team, buy, repair and sell World War II military gear, travelling the world in search of rare artefacts to restore and sell.

programme.title: Cooper's Treasure
programme.desc: Following the Columbus trail, bad weather strikes and Darrell dives past the limits of his gear into extreme danger. Plus, a huge discovery changes everything.

programme.title: Shed And Buried: Classic Cars
programme.desc: Henry and Fuzz stop by a shed in Leighton Buzzard filled with astonishing American muscle cars. The pair pick a trusty classic with room for a profit.

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.desc: Does the Devil really exist? Tony Harris separates fact from fiction as he investigates photos, videos and sounds that allegedly have a link to Satan; are recordings of an exorcism proof that demonic possession is real?

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Bizarre, mysterious tales ran rampant and are still being told to this day; are these strange tales of the American frontier simply legend, or was the west far stranger than one could possibly imagine?

programme.title: Pawn Stars Do America
programme.desc: Rick, Corey, and Chum are making big deals in the smallest state; in Providence, R.I., the guys cruise over to a muscle car collection, check out a rare book written by John Adams, and take aim at a harpoon gun.

programme.title: Swamp People
programme.desc: As a drastic drop in water levels scrambles the swamp, Mr. Daniel challenges Zak to haul in an unheard-of 100 feet of gator; Bruce and Anna flee crushing boat traffic and wind up deep in a remote slough; battling through a marsh full of tiny lizards, Ronnie and Timmy make a radical mid-day change; Jacob and Little Willie chase the legendary "Crocogator"; Troy's solo grind forces him to call in Cha

programme.title: Ancient Aliens 17
programme.desc: Throughout the ancient world, there are depictions of mysterious figures that appear to be half-human and half-bird.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: A British woman in the 20th century stunned Egyptologists by accurately locating structures and artefacts. Perhaps she had an otherworldly agenda.

programme.title: Erased: WW2's Heroes of Color
programme.desc: Unearthing the hidden heroes of the 320th Barrage Balloon Battalion, the only all-Black combat unit to fight on the D-Day beaches to help liberate Europe.

programme.title: Erased: WW2's Heroes of Color
programme.desc: The Black Panthers, an elite tank unit, push back Hitler's final advance.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: When two float planes carrying tourists collide near a spectacular Alaskan waterfall, investigators turn to 3D technology to figure out why. (5 of 10) 7+.

programme.title: Ultimate Airport Dubai
programme.desc: Customs officers catch a smuggler hiding 2,000 bottles of illegal prescription medication. A ground dispatcher races to prepare a cash shipment of $20 million. (S3, ep 10) 7+.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Alaskans utilize the sun-drenched days of summer to learn valuable lessons of survival.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: With Alaska in bloom, residents of the Arctic must seize the endless daylight.

programme.title: National Parks: USA: New Beginnings
programme.desc: From bear cubs to bison calves and fox kits, life blossoms in National Parks.

programme.title: Disney Celebrates America: The Pursuit of Happiness
programme.desc: A coast-to-coast event exploring Disney Parks and attractions as a portal through which America's greatest stories, triumphs and traditions are celebrated.

programme.title: Nick's Wild Ride With Nick Hoffman
programme.desc: After a tough deer season, Nick visits a friend at Western Kentucky University who helps him find unexpected luck on and off the field.

programme.title: Dropped: Arctic Drift
programme.desc: With 24 hours remaining and 20 miles to the extraction point, a massive blizzard moves into the Brooks Range forcing Chris and Casey to make some tough decisions in order to make it out of the Brooks Range safely.

programme.title: Huntech Pro
programme.desc: Season 6 kicks off near Vivo with a powerful family-driven meat hunt in Limpopo. This episode is all about family, firsts, and the true purpose of hunting—putting meat on the table and creating unforgettable memories in the African bush.

programme.title: The One
programme.desc: Mike and his family are packing their bags and heading to Africa.

programme.title: History Unsolved: The Investigation Files
programme.desc: Question whether Napoleon Bonaparte was poisoned in exile, then find out whose bones were buried underneath Benjamin Franklin's London home; analyze evidence that suggests that Grand Duchess Anastasia may have escaped the 1918 Romanov massacre.

programme.title: How the Nazis Lost the War
programme.desc: In pursuit of their Aryan dream, the Nazis were encumbered by an ideological war from within that would undermine their ability to succeed in World War II.

programme.title: Battle of Midway: The True Story
programme.desc: America's first victory in the Pacific during World War II is retold from the vantage point of the three U.S. attack planes as they overcame the enemy ambush to face off against the Mitsubishi A6M Zero, a long-range fighter, in the air.

programme.title: The Battle of Normandy: 85 Days in Hell
programme.desc: On D-Day, Allied forces land in Normandy, France, to beat back the German troops and liberate France; previously unseen archival footage captures the 85-day struggle to liberate Europe and includes rare images of the battle itself.

programme.title: The Dead Files
programme.desc: Steve and Amy travel to Iowa, where a woman claims evil forces are tearing her family apart.

programme.title: The Dead Files
programme.desc: Amy and Steve travel to Springfield, Ohio, where a man claims a malicious spirit is threatening to destroy his home, his health and his marriage; he fears for his life and that of his wife if the escalating paranormal activity is not stopped.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: A family prepares to move from Tacoma to Vashon Island, Wash., because of its eccentric reputation and seemingly untouched setting.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: A couple search for a house on Fidalgo Island, Wash., where their boys can have positive experiences.

programme.title: The Climate Baby Dilemma
programme.desc: For a growing number of young people, the climate crisis is affecting decisions about whether to have kids.

programme.title: The Pretendians
programme.desc: Anishinaabe author Drew H. Taylor investigates how and why Indigenous identity, culture and art are being appropriated.

programme.title: I Am Heath Ledger
programme.desc: Naomi Watts, Ben Mendelsohn, Ang Lee are among the contributors to a documentary celebrating the life and work of the Australian actor, who died in 2008.

programme.title: America's Wild Seasons
programme.desc: As plunging temperatures bring nature into winter, some animals flee south to find milder climes. But others are determined to tough out the brutal cold.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Chase gets a call from retired U.S. Army Staff Sgt. Travis Mills, who is building a retreat to help combat-injured veterans and their families; the builders must turn a cottage into an ADA-compliant event center for veterans and their families.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Meet the Cannons -- they need a new roof, additional sleeping space and, most importantly, higher ceilings; the Cabin Masters transport a very heavy stone hearth, Jedi and Ashley race to assemble a set of stools, and the guys prank Ashley.
